---
id: substitute-collateral
title: "Substitute collateral on a repo deal"
description: "Replaces the pledged collateral instrument. Rejected with 409 if the counterparty has an open margin call."
sidebar_label: "Substitute collateral on a repo deal"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Substitute collateral on a repo deal"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/deals/{id}/substitute-collateral"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Replaces the pledged collateral instrument. Rejected with 409 if the counterparty has an open margin call.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
